---
title: "Projects"
---

# Projects

## Climate dashboards

I have contributed to the development of digital dashboards that present climate-service results in a structured and visual way.

These projects combine:

- scientific analysis
- user-oriented design
- clear visual hierarchy
- communication of technical outputs

## Seasonal forecasting communication

I work with seasonal prediction systems and related verification products, helping translate technical information into forms that are easier to interpret.

Topics include:

- forecast skill
- uncertainty
- circulation patterns
- precipitation outlooks
- postprocessed products

## Future direction

I am increasingly interested in science communication for:

- Destination Earth
- digital twins
- Earth-system simulation
- climate services
- educational and stakeholder-facing storytelling
